name: update_scratchpad
description:
Update the per-conversation agent scratchpad — a small self-maintained notebook visible at the start of every turn via the system prompt.

Use this to record:
- Key facts discovered during multi-step research
- Decisions and rationale that should persist across turns
- Plan / to-do status when tasks span many iterations
- Useful context you want to remember after compaction

Keep it concise (the store is capped at 4000 characters — oldest content is trimmed first). Prefer `append` for new findings and `replace` when refactoring the whole note. Use `clear` to wipe it once a task is fully resolved.

action.description: How to update the scratchpad. 'append' adds a timestamped entry to the end. 'replace' overwrites with the given content. 'clear' empties it.

content.description: Text to write. Required for 'append' and 'replace'; ignored for 'clear'.
